name: Confluence
description: Monitor Confluence spaces and user access for documentation and policy publishing compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to your Atlassian account at id.atlassian.com
2. Go to Security > API tokens (id.atlassian.com/manage-profile/security/api-tokens)
3. Click 'Create API token', give it a name, and copy the token
4. Enter the fields above:
   - Site Domain: your Atlassian site (e.g. yourcompany.atlassian.net)
   - Email: the email of the account that created the token
   - API Token: the token you just copied
   - Group Name (optional): leave empty for the default 'confluence-users' group, or enter your custom group name
5. Tip: We recommend using an Atlassian service account rather than a personal account. Create one at admin.atlassian.com > Directory > Users

checks.name: Publish Policies
checks.description: Verifies Confluence spaces exist for policy publishing

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Confluence group members for employee access management
